item.title: Reposted (Again) for awareness
item.description:
My fault, the original post contained an errant photo and I couldn't figure out how to delete it by itself. So, a repost of my original repost. Down Vote me to hell, it's not for the points. I want this info splattered everywhere people that can use it can see it.
Героям слава! Слава Україні! ?? Glory to the Heroes! Glory to Ukraine! Death to the Russian Invaders!!!

item.title: Been thinking about the narrative
item.description: Don't see shaming of surrendered soldier happen often here, but see it enough online. Pushing the first narrative has the benefit of possibly bolstering Ukrainian moral, but the downside would be Russia viewing its relative restraint in use of force as weak. What Russia has done so far is an atrocity, but it is far less than what they could be doing. The upside of the second narrative is hopefully persuading Russian invaders to surrender rather than fight this needless war. This would help negate the following potential play. I worry the first wave of Russian invaders was made up of the less devoted and nationalistic units. Why do this? 1) Thin the ranks of the loyally weakest and 2) Show the growing Russian casualty list to the more fanatical 2nd wave troops to justify upcoming atrocities. This is purely speculation on my part.
item.dc:creator: kaiserkevin

item.dc:creator: ridiculousbudget

item.title: Maybe Putin bit off more than they could chew on this one
item.description: To put this in perspective from 1979-1989 during Russia’s war with Afghanistan they lost 333 Helicopter, 118 jets, 147 tanks, 15k personnel. The Ukrainians have destroyed nearly as many tanks, 1 tenth the number of airplanes, 1 fifth the personnel in two days. This is coming from Ukraine's Military so who knows if this inflated for morale.

item.title: Finally, Big problems for Russia
item.description: The Ukrainian state is delivering more than 3,000 deceased Russian soldiers to the International Committee of the Red Cross (IFRC) for identification. The Red Cross examines the identity of the deceased and searches for a relatives. No more hidden graves and lies! Sauce https://fb.watch/bpZ968uKaZ/
item.dc:creator: breguet

item.title: Landed my first full time job!
item.description: I feel so happy and so proud. I've been on a kind of "trial" at this steelcasting factory since july 2021. My attitude in the beginning was like "nah im not gonna stay here", but i absolutely, ABSOLUTELY love it there. So many exciting machines to learn and to run. A jungle of products to make. Watching the 1600°C steel being poured into casts I've made is SUCH a satisfying and fun feeling. I could not have found a better match for me, this job is a perfect fit, and I hope i will prove to be worth the chance I've been given. And like, being part of a social network of co-workers, to live a "normal" life, getting up at 5 in the morning and just loving all the very normal elements of what i'm doing. Clocking in, doing my best, clocking out. Every day. Being part of society in a way i'm not used to. (sorry sorry sorry for the selfie)
item.dc:creator: GroundedSkyCreature
